long_description:
NRE were alerted of link flaps between cbs01.eq02.sao02 xe-3/0/12:0 <-> cbs02.tm01.mia01 xe-0/0/27:1. Raising this INC to track progress.

close_notes: Sent email to provider. Awaiting response.
